inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Age of the individual in years.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age of the individual in years.

inputs.label: Resting Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Resting heart rate, typically measured upon waking.

businessContext_i18n.en: Resting heart rate, typically measured upon waking.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Genellikle uyanırken ölçülen dinlenme kalp atış hızı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Ruhepuls, typischerweise nach dem Aufwachen gemessen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence cardiaque au repos, généralement mesurée au réveil.
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia cardíaca en reposo, típicamente medida al despertar.

inputs.label: Maximum Heart Rate
inputs.businessContext: Maximum heart rate in beats per minute. Enter 0 to estimate from age (220 - age).

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum heart rate in beats per minute. Enter 0 to estimate from age (220 - age).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dakikadaki atım cinsinden maksimum kalp atış hızı. Yaştan tahmin etmek için 0 girin (220 - yaş).
businessContext_i18n.de: Maximale Herzfrequenz in Schlägen pro Minute. 0 eingeben, um aus dem Alter zu schätzen (220 - Alter).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence cardiaque maximale en battements par minute. Entrez 0 pour estimer à partir de l'âge (220 - âge).
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia cardíaca máxima en latidos por minuto. Ingrese 0 para estimar desde la edad (220 - edad).

inputs.label: Intensity
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of heart rate reserve used for anaerobic threshold (commonly 80-90%).

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of heart rate reserve used for anaerobic threshold (commonly 80-90%).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Anaerobik eşik için kullanılan kalp atış hızı rezervinin yüzdesi (genellikle %80-90).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz der Herzfrequenzreserve, der für die anaerobe Schwelle verwendet wird (üblich 80-90%).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de la réserve de fréquence cardiaque utilisé pour le seuil anaérobie (généralement 80-90 %).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de la reserva de frecuencia cardíaca utilizado para el umbral anaeróbico (comúnmente 80-90%).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
